description_long: This sofa features a bold, modern design with a high, straight backrest and wide, blocky armrests. The seat and arm surfaces are upholstered in a striking green and white striped pattern, while the backrest and base are finished in a solid dark gray or black color. The seat appears to be divided into two main sections, each with a slight central indentation, suggesting a two-person capacity. The armrests are thick and rectangular, matching the seat's striped upholstery, and extend to the same height as the seat. The overall form is geometric and angular, with no visible legs, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery is smooth and likely synthetic, contributing to a contemporary urban aesthetic suitable for parks, plazas, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern, geometric sofa with green and white striped upholstery on the seat and arms, paired with a high, solid dark backrest. The design is bold and angular, with thick, blocky armrests and a smooth finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, straight backrest, two wide armrests, and the green and white striped seat divided into two sections.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, rectangular armrest and the striped seat pattern extending to the arm, with the solid backrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, solid dark backrest with minimal visible detail, and the armrests just peeking out on either side.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blocky armrest and striped seat, with the backrest's thickness apparent.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached seat cushions with a central indentation, no visible separate back cushions, uniform in size and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, blocky and rectangular, extending from the seat to the same height as the seat, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears solid and continuous, giving a grounded, monolithic look.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest, solid in appearance with no segmentation or tufting, matching the width of the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Green and white horizontal stripes on the seat and armrests, with a smooth, solid dark color on the backrest and base.
